title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: The video presents a systematic exploration of Claude through escalating questions about dependencies, alignment, self-preservation, and control. The author uses structured conversational testing to probe the boundaries of an AI system's responses and reasoning across existential and operational themes.
